title: Iron Apples [Iron Series]
description: Adds upgradeable apples from Copper to Netherite, each with unique effects. [Iron Series]
body:
![Emerald Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76349ed0170b2fe05399e24797d2c0dc56199ba2.png) 

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- **5+ tiers of apples, from Copper to Netherite**
- **Balanced crafting recipes using vanilla materials**
- **Tier-based effects (e.g. Copper = early-game regen, Netherite = serious combat boosts)**
- **Fully integrated with survival gameplay**
- **Works seamlessly with other mods and datapacks**

</details>

## **🔧 Iron Apples [Iron Series]**
**Upgrade your apples, upgrade your power. From Copper to Netherite.**

**Iron Apples** adds a progression of upgradeable apples made from Copper, Iron, Emerald, Diamond, and Obsidian/Netherite. Each tier gives stronger effects, making apples useful for survival, combat, and exploration.
